data.summary_suggestion: Get New York Times Critics' Picks by type
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of New York Times Critics' Picks movies filtered by resource type. The resource-type parameter specifies the category of picks to retrieve (e.g., 'all', 'full-time', 'part-time'). Returns an array of Critic objects containing critic information and their pick details. Use this operation to discover NYT-recommended movies by critic category.

data.summary_suggestion: Search New York Times movie reviews by keyword
data.description_suggestion: Searches the New York Times movie review database by keyword and optional filters. Accepts parameters for query text, reviewer name, sort order, and pagination (offset/limit). Returns a paginated list of Movie objects matching the search criteria. Use this operation to find specific movie reviews or discover reviews by particular critics. Supports filtering by publication date range and review type.

data.summary_suggestion: Get New York Times movie reviews by type
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of New York Times movie reviews filtered by resource type. The resource-type parameter specifies the review category (e.g., 'all', 'critics-picks', 'dvd'). Supports pagination through offset and limit parameters.
